calendar.matters:
Motion For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-26-2019 Off Calendar

Motion For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-22-2019 Continued To Nov-26-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2018 Off Calendar

Amended Motion For Request For Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Dec-28-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day, having been continued from November 16, 2017, for further Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Arthur C. Chambers, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Chris Norris, and for plaintiff Elizabeth Norris, who was not present at this morning's hearing.
Plaintiff Chris Norris was placed under oath and testified.
Megan Kelly, Esq. appeared for defaulted defendant Nationstar Mortgage, LLC, but was not permitted to present evidence at this morning's hearing.
Simon Ward Brown, Litigation Resolution Analyst for defendant Nationstar Mortgage, LLC, was placed under oath but did not testify.
Default was entered against defendant Nationstar Mortgage, LLC on July 17, 2015.
Order denying defendant Nationstar Mortgage, LLC's motion to set aside the default was filed on May 16, 2017.
DOE defendants were dismissed today, December 28, 2017.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Chris Norris and Elizabeth Norris, and against the Defaulted Defendant Nationstar Mortgage, LLC, as follows:

Principal/Damages - $25,000.00.
Attorney Fees - $12,000.00.
Costs - $450.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $37,450.00.

The Court makes an additional finding that as of October 1, 2013, Nationstar Mortgage, LLC waived its security interest in 126 Argonaut Avenue, San Francisco, CA APN 6357-010 memorialized by the Deed of Trust dated March 28, 2008.

Proposed judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Amended Motion For Request For Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Nov-16-2017 Continued To Dec-28-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Arthur C. Chambers, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Chris Norris, who was placed under oath and testified.
Stan Pareto, a Real Estate Broker and witness for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Megan Kelly, Esq. appeared for defaulted defendant Nationstar Mortgage, LLC.
Simon Ward-Brown, Litigation Analyst for defaulted defendant Nationstar Mortgage, LLC, was placed under oath but did not testify.
Default was entered against defendant Nationstar Mortgage, LLC on July 15, 2015.
Order DENYING defendant Nationstar Mortgage, LLC's motion to set aside the default was issued on May 16, 2017.
To date, the DOE defendants have not been dismissed.

Good cause appearing, matter is CONTINUED to December 28, 2017 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 for further default prove-up hearing. Mr. Chambers shall file plaintiff's supplemental prove-up brief no later than December 11, 2017.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-08-2017 Continued To Sep-19-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion For Relief From Default And Leave To Defend
Off Calendar May-16-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Justin Balser (213) 688-9500 appearing through Court Call for Defendant, Nationstar Mortgage. Plaintiff in Propria Persona Chris Norris (415)692-1501.

Hearing is held. The Court questions why Mr. Balser did not comply with the tenative ruling rule and Mr. Balser responded that it is his oversight that he did not inform the peitioner that he would contest to the tentative. The Court instructs the parties to call one another and passes the matter.

The matter is recalled and the parties inform the Court they had discussions about the matter. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: DEFENDANT NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE, LLC's Motion For Relief From Default And Leave To Defend is taken under submission. Parties to submit a form of order.

Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk:N. Wong, Not Reported, D501.

Notice Of Motion For Relief From Default And Leave To Defend
Off Calendar Apr-25-2017 Continued To May-15-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Chris Norris, Esq. (415-692-1501) for Plaintiff/ opposing party in Pro Per.
Justin Balser, Esq. (213-688-9500) for Defendant/Moving party NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE, LLC. through Court Call.

The Court asks Plaintiff compliance with the CCP and SFLR, service on previous attorney, and asks if Nationstar was properly served. ARGUED. Plaintiff argues compliance,previous attorney had problems with e-filing,requests more time to get a declaration. Defendant argues service, proof of service does not accurately reflect what happened, no service, shown good cause to set aside. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE, LLC's Motion For Relief From Default And Leave To Defend is continued to May 15, 2017. Plaintiff to submit a declaration by the end of the week (4/28/17) and provide it to the other side. Defendant has until the following Friday (5/5/17) to respond. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
